pattern: Summing the absolute gap between each neighbouring pair of character codes turns a string into a single roughness measure in one linear pass.
hints: Work with the numeric code of each character rather than the letter itself.
Only adjacent pairs contribute, so slide a window of two positions across the string.
Accumulate the absolute difference of every consecutive pair into a running total.

edge_inputs.description: shortest allowed string of two identical letters has score zero
two extreme letters give the maximum single gap
mixed letters from the examples domain
all same letter produces zero score

stress.description: random lowercase strings of varying contents
stress.note: covers a wide spread of adjacent gaps
